title: Wrap WETH - Open App
meta_description: wrap weth with a verified ETH-to-WETH route; open the app, connect your wallet, and confirm the ERC-20 token on Ethereum.
hero_h2: Convert native ETH into an ERC-20-ready asset
hero_lead: wrap weth by converting native ETH into Wrapped Ether for ERC-20 DeFi use, with a direct app path and contract checks before you sign.
what_is: WETH is Wrapped Ether, an ERC-20 representation of ETH created when ETH is deposited into the WETH9 smart contract. The Ethereum Mainnet contract is listed on Etherscan.

how.d: Use the official WETH destination and keep the domain in view before connecting a wallet.
Select Ethereum Mainnet, connect a self-custody wallet, and keep some ETH unwrapped for gas.
Enter the ETH amount; the WETH9 contract credits WETH against deposited ETH.
Review the network, contract address, and wallet simulation, then sign only if everything matches.

points.p: WETH gives ETH an ERC-20 interface used by many DeFi contracts; Ethereum's ERC-20 docs explain the standard.
Wrapping deposits ETH into WETH9; unwrapping reduces your WETH balance and releases native ETH through the same contract logic.
On Ethereum Mainnet, the commonly referenced WETH9 address is 0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2; verify it before signing.

faq.a: It usually means converting native ETH into WETH, the ERC-20 version of ETH used by many Ethereum apps.

faq.q: Is wrap weth the same as swapping ETH?
faq.a: It is not a market swap in the usual sense; ETH is deposited into the WETH contract and WETH is credited at the contract level, while gas is still paid in ETH.

faq.q: Which contract should I check before I wrap weth?
faq.a: On Ethereum Mainnet, verify the WETH9 contract at 0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2 before signing.

faq.q: Can I unwrap after I wrap weth?
faq.a: Yes. Unwrapping reverses the WETH position back to native ETH through the contract or a wallet interface that supports it.

faq.q: Do I need ETH gas to wrap weth?
faq.a: Yes. Keep ETH in the same wallet and network for gas; WETH itself does not pay Ethereum transaction fees.

footer_note: wrap-weth.github.io is not the official app; verify weth.io and the WETH9 contract before signing; educational content, not financial advice.
